hook: Reliability is attractive because it lowers defensive effort.
body: When someone behaves predictably in healthy ways, you waste less energy bracing for confusion.

hook: A lot of people call steadiness boring only because their system got trained on volatility.
body: Security does not kill attraction; it creates space for attraction to deepen without chaos.

hook: Security does not kill attraction; it creates space for attraction to deepen without chaos.
body: Knowing where you stand after a date can feel calmer and more magnetic than guessing all week.

body: Notice whether your body relaxes around the connection or stays on constant alert.
